TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.title: Live Premier League
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.subtitle: Brentford v Fulham
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Brentford v Fulham (Kick-off 12.30pm). Coverage of the top-flight match from Gtech Community Stadium, as the West London rivals go head to head. The visitors came from a goal down in the reverse fixture to win the game 3-1 at Craven Cottage. Mikkel Damsgaard had given the Bees the lead in the 20th minute but three goals inside 12 minutes from Alex Iwobi, Harry Wilson and an Ethan Pinnock own-goal turned the game on its head and gave Fulham the three points.

TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.title: Live: The Gallagher PREM
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.subtitle: Exeter Chiefs v Northampton Saints
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Exeter Chiefs v Northampton Saints (Kick-off 3.05pm). Coverage of the match from Sandy Park. The hosts produced an incredible second-half comeback in the reverse fixture in September, as they came from 33-7 down to earn themselves a 33-33 draw. The Saints scored five tries in the first half before the Chiefs fought back with four unanswered tries in the second period to take a share of the spoils.

TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.title: Live Premier League
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.subtitle: Chelsea v Manchester United
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Chelsea v Manchester United (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the top-flight match from Stamford Bridge. The visitors won the reverse fixture back in September in a game that was influenced by a fifth-minute red card for Chelsea keeper Robert Sanchez. The Spaniard took out Bryan Mbuemo as he was through on goal to leave the Blues with 10 men for the majority of the game as Bruno Fernandes and Casemeiro scored in the first half to give the Red Devils a two-goal lead. Casemeiro was sent off himself in first-half stoppage time but the visitors held on to win 2-1 despite Trevoh Chalobah's 80th-minute header.

TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.subtitle: Exeter Chiefs v Northampton Saints
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.description: Exeter Chiefs v Northampton Saints (Kick-off 3.05pm). Coverage of the match from Sandy Park. The hosts produced an incredible second-half comeback in the reverse fixture in September, as they came from 33-7 down to earn themselves a 33-33 draw. The Saints scored five tries in the first half before the Chiefs fought back with four unanswered tries in the second period to take a share of the spoils.

TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.title: Live: The Gallagher PREM
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.subtitle: Bath Rugby v Harlequins
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.description: Bath Rugby v Harlequins (Kick-off 5.30pm). Coverage of the match from The Recreation Ground. The reverse fixture back in September was a high-scoring affair as the hosts came away with a 47-31 victory. The game was in the balance at half-time with Harlequins leading 17-14, but Bath scored five tries in 35 minutes to turn the match on its head and earn themselves a brilliant victory at Twickenham Stoop.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Live: NBA Basketball

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Live: Inside the NBA
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: This Emmy Award-winning studio show, which airs following NBA telecasts on ESPN, is hosted by Ernie Johnson, with analysis from Hall of Famer Charles Barkley and NBA champions Kenny Smith and Shaquille O'Neal. It's a mix of highlights, interviews and hijinks, notably the verbal sparring sessions between the outspoken Barkley and his straight man, Smith. The show also welcomes various guest analysts throughout the season.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

HBO.East.us2.description: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

HBO.East.us2.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
HBO.East.us2.description: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

HBO.East.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.East.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

When Peter finds a mysterious briefcase that was his father's, he pursues a quest to solve his parents' disappearance. His search takes him to Oscorp and the lab of Dr. Curt Connors, setting him on a collision course with Connors' alter ego, the Lizard.

HBO.East.us2.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
HBO.East.us2.description: Greater conflict lies ahead for Spider-Man, with the emergence of Electro, a foe far more powerful than he is and the return of his old friend, Harry Osborn.

HBO.West.us2.description: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

HBO.West.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.West.us2.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
HBO.West.us2.description: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

HBO.West.us2.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
HBO.West.us2.description: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.West.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.West.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.West.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Sally and Gillian Owens, born into a magical family, have mostly avoided witchcraft themselves. But when Gillian's vicious boyfriend, Jimmy Angelov, dies unexpectedly, the Owens sisters give themselves a crash course in hard magic. With policeman Gary Hallet growing suspicious, the girls struggle to resurrect Angelov -- and unwittingly inject his corpse with an evil spirit that threatens to end their family line.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shadows
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A high school student exploring her independence on homecoming night is disrupted by her older brother and the shadows of their past.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Girls Trip
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Barbie

In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: White Whale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Greg navigates his first day as a teacher at Ludlow, Katie deals with being suspended, and Archie assists Sunny in finding an advisor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Angry, like an Angry Person
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: To avoid Walt's party, Greg dedicates himself to a student; with her suspension lifted, Katie considers one-night stands.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Cop Hawk
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: While relishing in his new fling, Greg offers Tommy a place to crash; Katie confronts the student behind some personal campus graffiti; Dylan impresses Walt in her new role; Sunny wrestles with a prestigious job offer.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Jerrod Carmichael: Don't Be Gay
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Emmy-winning comedian Jerrod Carmichael takes to the stage for his latest comedy special, bringing his signature blend of unbridled honesty, emotional gut punches and sharp, dry wit.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Jerrod Carmichael: Love at the Store
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic discusses topics including poverty, wealth, crime and race in a performance at the Comedy Store in Hollywood, Calif.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Dennis Miller: All In
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Dennis Miller performs a live stand-up show at the Coliseum in Caesars Palace, Las Vegas; he presents witty tales in his signature erudite and articulate style.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: White Whale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Greg navigates his first day as a teacher at Ludlow, Katie deals with being suspended, and Archie assists Sunny in finding an advisor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Angry, like an Angry Person
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: To avoid Walt's party, Greg dedicates himself to a student; with her suspension lifted, Katie considers one-night stands.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Marc Maron: Panicked
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian and podcaster Marc Maron performs a standup act; he offers his nuanced perspective on our increasingly uncertain world.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Practical Magic
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Sally and Gillian Owens, born into a magical family, have mostly avoided witchcraft themselves. But when Gillian's vicious boyfriend, Jimmy Angelov, dies unexpectedly, the Owens sisters give themselves a crash course in hard magic. With policeman Gary Hallet growing suspicious, the girls struggle to resurrect Angelov -- and unwittingly inject his corpse with an evil spirit that threatens to end their family line.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Friendship
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shadows
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A high school student exploring her independence on homecoming night is disrupted by her older brother and the shadows of their past.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Blair Witch
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A young man and his friends venture into the Black Hills Forest in Maryland to uncover the mystery surrounding his missing sister. Many believe her disappearance 17 years earlier is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch. At first the group is hopeful, especially when two locals act as guides through the dark and winding woods. As the night wears on, a visit from a menacing presence soon makes them realize that the legend is all too real, and more sinister than they could have ever imagined.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Insidious
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Men
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mountainhead
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Four friends reunite during worldwide economic turmoil.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Moonlight
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Norm of the North
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Norm (Rob Schneider) the polar bear doesn't know how to hunt, but he does possess the unique ability to talk to humans. When the wealthy Mr. Greene (Ken Jeong) unveils his idea to build luxury condos in the Arctic, Norm realizes that his beloved home is in jeopardy. Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. Once there, he meets a surprising ally (Maya Kay) who helps him hatch a scheme to sabotage the shady developer's plans.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Puss in Boots
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: 33 Photos From the Ghetto
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Telling the story of the only known photographs from inside the Warsaw Ghetto during the April 1943 uprising and its brutal repression that were not taken by German forces.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Murder in Glitterball City
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The body of James Carroll, a gifted hairdresser and drag performer, is discovered. Details are shared of Banis's and Mundt's relationship, revealing both men as complex suspects. Mundt's testimony against his former lover Banis is damning.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Murder in Glitterball City
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After Joey Banis is found guilty of the murder of James Carroll, the trial of Jeffrey Mundt begins. Joey Banis's video "confession" is scrutinized and allegedly staged by Mundt. The second trial concludes with a stunning outcome.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Greatest Showman
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spider-Man
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: "Spider-Man" centers on student Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) who, after being bitten by a genetically-altered spider, gains superhuman strength and the spider-like ability to cling to any surface. He vows to use his abilities to fight crime, coming to understand the words of his beloved Uncle Ben: "With great power comes great responsibility.".

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spider-Man 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When a failed nuclear fusion experiment results in an explosion that kills his wife, Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into Dr. Octopus, a cyborg with deadly metal tentacles. Doc Ock blames Spider-Man for the accident and seeks revenge. Meanwhile, Spidey's alter ego, Peter Parker, faces fading powers and self-doubt. Complicating matters are his best friend's hatred for Spider-Man and his true love's sudden engagement to another man.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spider-Man 3
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Peter Parker and M.J. seem to finally be on the right track in their complicated relationship, but trouble looms for the superhero and his lover. Peter's Spider-Man suit turns black and takes control of him, not only giving Peter enhanced power but also bringing out the dark side of his personality. He must overcome the suit's influence as two supervillains, Sandman and Venom, rise up to destroy him and all those he holds dear.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Devil Wears Prada
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Abandoned by his parents and raised by an aunt and uncle, teenager Peter Parker, AKA Spider-Man, is trying to sort out who he is and exactly what his feelings are for his first crush, Gwen Stacy. When Peter finds a mysterious briefcase that was his father's, he pursues a quest to solve his parents' disappearance. His search takes him to Oscorp and the lab of Dr. Curt Connors, setting him on a collision course with Connors' alter ego, the Lizard.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Greater conflict lies ahead for Spider-Man, with the emergence of Electro, a foe far more powerful than he is and the return of his old friend, Harry Osborn.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Little Miss Sunshine
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The Hoover family -- a man (Greg Kinnear), his wife (Toni Collette), an uncle (Steve Carell), a brother (Paul Dano) and a grandfather (Alan Arkin) -- puts the fun back in dysfunctional by piling into a VW bus and heading to California to support a daughter (Abigail Breslin) in her bid to win the Little Miss Sunshine Contest. The sanity of everyone involved is stretched to the limit as the group's quirks cause epic problems as they travel along their interstate route.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Lobster
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Burning Ojai: Our Fire Story
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Documenting one of the largest wildfires in California's history as well as the aftermath; interviews with residents of Ventura County affected by the devastation.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ice on Fire
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Visionaries and scientists work to mitigate climate change and minimize climate-related events, despite a rapidly warming planet.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Perfect Match
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Fate of the Furious
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Jason Isbell: Running With Our Eyes Closed
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jason Isbell's musical evolution and creative process as he goes into the studio to record his album "Reunions" with his band, The 400 Unit; Isbell lays bare his childhood, struggles with addiction and relationships, funneling it into his music.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Counting Crows: Have You Seen Me Lately?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After their debut album's success, Counting Crows and singer Adam Duritz became global rockstars; interviews and 90s footage show how they navigated sudden fame while staying true to their art.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: DMX: Don't Try To Understand
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Focusing on a year in the life of Earl "DMX" Simmons, this documentary follows the late rapper through his 2019 comeback tour after serving a year in prison and uses archival materials to chronicle his struggle with addiction.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Wizkid: Long Live Lagos
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Tracing the roots and global rise of Nigerian superstar Wizkid as he prepares for his first major stadium concert.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Aliens
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After floating in space for 57 years, Lt. Ripley's shuttle is found by a deep space salvage team. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien 3
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien Resurrection
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Covenant
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Romulus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Generation Por qué?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A woman pursues her acting dreams in New York City while enduring her very conservative parents.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The year is 1926, and Newt Scamander (Eddie Redmayne) has just completed a global excursion to find and document an extraordinary array of magical creatures. Arriving in New York for a brief stopover, he might have come and gone without incident, were it not for a No-Maj (American for Muggle) named Jacob, a misplaced magical case, and the escape of some of Newt's fantastic beasts, which could spell trouble for both the wizarding and No-Maj worlds.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Get Him to the Greek
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Man of Steel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Megan Leavey
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Tournament of Champions
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As the top bowlers arrive at The Tournament of Champions in Akron, Ohio, the future of the PBA Tour hangs in the balance.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Happy and You Know It
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Featuring a colorful and charming cast and their toe-tapping songs, the film reframes children's music as a misunderstood yet vital cultural art form that influences how kids develop; it chronicles the unexpected paths artists take to embrace the creative freedom found in writing music that shapes childhoods.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: It's Never Over, Jeff Buckley
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A portrait of Jeff Buckley, whose voice, emotional sound and sudden death left the music world reeling.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Jagged
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An intimate exploration of Alanis Morissette and her groundbreaking 1995 album "Jagged Little Pill.".

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Woodstock 99: Peace, Love, and Rage
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Unfolding over three blazing hot days and nights of nonstop performances and heaving mosh pits, a July 1999 music festival promoted to echo the counterculture idealism of the 1969 original instead devolves into riots, looting and sexual assaults.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Flight Risk
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Plagued by a violent and recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle of death and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Sorry, Baby
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Dark Wizard
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Dean Potter encuentra alegría y escape en sus primeros éxitos en la escalada extrema, donde conecta con una comunidad de personas afines que buscan la libertad y la adrenalina de este deporte. La energía inquieta de Dean lo impulsa a abrir nuevas rutas y batir nuevos récords mundiales, aunque a veces esto lo lleve a entrar en conflicto con las autoridades y a tener dificultades en sus relaciones personales.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Mientras disfruta de su nueva aventura, Greg le ofrece a Tommy un lugar donde quedarse. Katie se enfrenta al estudiante responsable de unos grafitis personales en el campus. Dylan impresiona a Walt en su nuevo puesto. Sunny se debate ante una oferta de trabajo prestigiosa.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: La IA genera un guion inutilizable, así que Valerie debe asumir su papel de productora ejecutiva para hacer control de daños.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Cinco años después, las chicas han tomado su propio camino. Una de ellas intenta hacer su vida en el extranjero, otra continúa sus estudios, y una relación se hace cada vez más inestable.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Alien: Romulus
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Un grupo de colonos espaciales se enfrenta a la criatura más aterradora del universo en una nave espacial abandonada a la que han accedido para recuperar cámaras de criostasis, con las que piensan huir a un planeta lejano.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim

Over the years, cast members have included Jimmy Fallon, Will Ferrell, Tina Fey, Kate McKinnon, Seth Meyers, Eddie Murphy, Bill Murray, Mike Myers, Amy Poehler, Chris Rock, Maya Rudolph, Andy Samberg, Kristen Wiig, and many more, as well as recurring guests such as Alec Baldwin, Melissa McCarthy and Steve Martin; from executive producer Lorne Michaels, "SNL" is widely considered an American late-night institution and continues to earn critical praise.

Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

truTV.HD.us2.title: Wonder Woman 1984
truTV.HD.us2.description: Diana Prince lives quietly among mortals in the vibrant, sleek 1980s -- an era of excess driven by the pursuit of having it all. Though she's come into her full powers, she maintains a low profile by curating ancient artifacts, and only performing heroic acts incognito. But soon, Diana will have to muster all of her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah, a villainess who possesses superhuman strength and agility.

truTV.HD.us2.title: Fist Fight
truTV.HD.us2.description: On the last day before summer vacation, high school teacher Andy Campbell tries his best to keep it together amid senior pranks, a dysfunctional administration and budget cuts that threaten his job. Things go from bad to worse when he crosses Ron Strickland, the school's toughest and most feared teacher. When Strickland gets fired, he challenges Campbell to a fight after school. As news of the showdown spreads like wildfire, poor Andy desperately seeks any way out of his date with certain doom.

truTV.HD.us2.title: Central Intelligence
truTV.HD.us2.description: Bullied as a teen for being overweight, Bob Stone shows up to his high school reunion looking fit and muscular. While there, he finds Calvin Joyner, a fast-talking accountant who misses his glory days as a popular athlete. Stone is now a lethal CIA agent who needs Calvin's number skills to help him save the compromised U.S. spy satellite system. Together, the former classmates encounter shootouts, espionage and double-crosses while trying to prevent worldwide chaos.

Though she's come into her full powers, she maintains a low profile by curating ancient artifacts, and only performing heroic acts incognito. But soon, Diana will have to muster all of her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah, a villainess who possesses superhuman strength and agility.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Aquaman
TBS.HD.us2.description: Once home to the most advanced civilization on Earth, the city of Atlantis is now an underwater kingdom ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a vast army at his disposal, Orm plans to conquer the remaining oceanic people -- and then the surface world. Standing in his way is Arthur, Orm's half-human, half-Atlantean brother and true heir to the throne. With help from royal counselor Vulko, Arthur must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and embrace his destiny as protector of the deep sea.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom

Hoping to end his reign of terror, Aquaman forges an unlikely alliance with his brother, Orm, the former king of Atlantis. Setting aside their differences, they join forces to protect their kingdom and save the world from irreversible destruction.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Central Intelligence
TBS.HD.us2.description: Bullied as a teen for being overweight, Bob Stone shows up to his high school reunion looking fit and muscular. While there, he finds Calvin Joyner, a fast-talking accountant who misses his glory days as a popular athlete. Stone is now a lethal CIA agent who needs Calvin's number skills to help him save the compromised U.S. spy satellite system. Together, the former classmates encounter shootouts, espionage and double-crosses while trying to prevent worldwide chaos.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Eleven
AMC.HD.us2.description: Dapper Danny Ocean is a man of action. Less than 24 hours into his parole from a New Jersey penitentiary, the wry, charismatic thief is already rolling out his next plan. Following three rules: Don't hurt anybody, don't steal from anyone who doesn't deserve it, and play the game like you've got nothing to lose. Danny orchestrates the most sophisticated, elaborate casino heist in history.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Thirteen
AMC.HD.us2.description: Danny Ocean and his gang hatch an ambitious plot for revenge after ruthless casino owner Willy Bank double-crosses Reuben Tishkoff, Danny's friend and mentor. First, Ocean's gang plan to hit Bank in the paycheck by reversing the precept that the house always wins. Next, they will deal a crushing blow to Bank's ego by ruining his reputation as the only hotelier to earn the Royal Review's Five Diamond Award for each of his properties.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Moneyball
AMC.HD.us2.description: Billy Beane (Brad Pitt), general manager of the Oakland A's, one day has an epiphany: Baseball's conventional wisdom is all wrong. Faced with a tight budget, Beane must reinvent his team by outsmarting the richer ball clubs. Joining forces with Ivy League graduate Peter Brand (Jonah Hill), Beane prepares to challenge old-school traditions. He recruits bargain-bin players whom the scouts have labeled as flawed, but have game-winning potential. Based on the book by Michael Lewis.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Twelve
AMC.HD.us2.description: After successfully robbing five casinos in one night, Danny Ocean and his crew of thieves have big problems. Despite pulling off one of the biggest heists in Las Vegas history, the members of the gang have already spent much of the money they stole. Casino owner Terry Benedict demands that Ocean return the money, plus millions more in interest. Unable to come up the cash, the crew is forced to come together to pull off another series of heists, this time in Europe.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future Part III
AMC.HD.us2.description: In this final chapter, Marty McFly (Michael J. Fox) obtains a 70-year-old message from the time-traveling Dr. Emmett Brown (Christopher Lloyd), in which he informs Marty that he has retired to a small town in the Old West. Marty then finds out that the Doc was murdered shortly after sending the letter. In order to save his friend, Marty will have to travel back in time, disentangle a lovestruck Doc from a local schoolmarm, and repair the DeLorean -- all while avoiding a posse of gunslingers.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future
AMC.HD.us2.description: In this 1980s sci-fi classic, small-town California teen Marty McFly is thrown back into the '50s when an experiment by his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown goes awry. Traveling through time in a modified DeLorean car, Marty encounters young versions of his parents, and must make sure that they fall in love, or he'll cease to exist. Even more dauntingly, Marty has to return to his own time and save the life of Doc Brown.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future Part II
AMC.HD.us2.description: In this zany sequel, time-traveling duo Marty McFly and Dr. Emmett Brown return from saving Marty's future son from disaster, only to discover their own time transformed. In this nightmarish version of Hill Valley, Marty's father has been murdered and Biff Tannen, Marty's nemesis, has profited. After uncovering the secret to Biff's success -- a sports almanac from the future -- Marty and the Doc embark on a quest to repair the space-time continuum.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Silence of the Lambs
AMC.HD.us2.description: Jodie Foster stars as Clarice Starling, a top student at the FBI's training academy. Jack Crawford (Scott Glenn) wants Clarice to interview Dr. Hannibal Lecter (Anthony Hopkins), a brilliant psychiatrist who is also a violent psychopath, serving life behind bars for various acts of murder and cannibalism. Crawford believes that Lecter may have insight into a case and that Starling, as an attractive young woman, may be just the bait to draw him out.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future Part III
AMC.HD.us2.description: In this final chapter, Marty McFly (Michael J. Fox) obtains a 70-year-old message from the time-traveling Dr. Emmett Brown (Christopher Lloyd), in which he informs Marty that he has retired to a small town in the Old West. Marty then finds out that the Doc was murdered shortly after sending the letter. In order to save his friend, Marty will have to travel back in time, disentangle a lovestruck Doc from a local schoolmarm, and repair the DeLorean -- all while avoiding a posse of gunslingers.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Grips, Grunts and Groans
AMC.HD.us2.description: Circumstances force an over-matched Curly into a wrestling ring against a superior opponent; a woman's perfume proves to be his secret weapon and saves him.

AMC.HD.us2.description: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Beer Barrel Polecats

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Crime on Their Hands
AMC.HD.us2.description: The boys track gem thieves.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future
AMC.HD.us2.description: In this 1980s sci-fi classic, small-town California teen Marty McFly is thrown back into the '50s when an experiment by his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown goes awry. Traveling through time in a modified DeLorean car, Marty encounters young versions of his parents, and must make sure that they fall in love, or he'll cease to exist. Even more dauntingly, Marty has to return to his own time and save the life of Doc Brown.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future Part II
AMC.HD.us2.description: In this zany sequel, time-traveling duo Marty McFly and Dr. Emmett Brown return from saving Marty's future son from disaster, only to discover their own time transformed. In this nightmarish version of Hill Valley, Marty's father has been murdered and Biff Tannen, Marty's nemesis, has profited. After uncovering the secret to Biff's success -- a sports almanac from the future -- Marty and the Doc embark on a quest to repair the space-time continuum.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Eleven
AMC.HD.us2.description: Dapper Danny Ocean is a man of action. Less than 24 hours into his parole from a New Jersey penitentiary, the wry, charismatic thief is already rolling out his next plan. Following three rules: Don't hurt anybody, don't steal from anyone who doesn't deserve it, and play the game like you've got nothing to lose. Danny orchestrates the most sophisticated, elaborate casino heist in history.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Armageddon
AMC.HD.us2.description: When an asteroid threatens to collide with Earth, NASA honcho Dan Truman (Billy Bob Thornton) determines the only way to stop it is to drill into its surface and detonate a nuclear bomb. This leads him to renowned driller Harry Stamper (Bruce Willis), who agrees to helm the dangerous space mission provided he can bring along his own hotshot crew. Among them is the cocksure A.J. (Ben Affleck), who Harry thinks isn't good enough for his daughter (Liv Tyler), until the mission proves otherwise.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Live: TNA iMPACT!
AMC.HD.us2.description: Matches and storylines feature superstars battling for supremacy and championship gold within the ring.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Audacity
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Best of All Possible Worlds
AMC.HD.us2.description: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able; JoAnne provides therapy with benefits; Orson lands from Baltimore; the party for Dr. Green ends in a cat burglary.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Sneakers
AMC.HD.us2.description: Computer hacker Martin (Robert Redford) heads a group of specialists who test the security of various San Francisco companies. Martin is approached by two National Security Agency officers who ask him to steal a newly invented decoder. Martin and his team discover that the black box can crack any encryption code, posing a huge threat if it lands in the wrong hands. When Martin realizes the NSA men who approached him are rogue agents, they frame him for the murder of the device's inventor.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Karate Kid Part II
AMC.HD.us2.description: After learning that his father is dying, karate master Mr. Miyagi (Noriyuki "Pat" Morita) returns home to Okinawa, bringing his protégé, Daniel, with him. In Japan, Miyagi is surprised to discover that his old sweetheart, Yukie, has remained single. Meanwhile, Daniel is attracted to Yukie's niece, Kumiko. But romance must be put on hold while Daniel and Miyagi deal with local bullies and long-harbored grudges.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Three Little Pigskins
AMC.HD.us2.description: While dressed for a promotional campaign, the Stooges are mistaken for "Horsemen of Boulder Dam," college football players; they are asked to play privately for a gangster.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Armageddon
AMC.HD.us2.description: When an asteroid threatens to collide with Earth, NASA honcho Dan Truman (Billy Bob Thornton) determines the only way to stop it is to drill into its surface and detonate a nuclear bomb. This leads him to renowned driller Harry Stamper (Bruce Willis), who agrees to helm the dangerous space mission provided he can bring along his own hotshot crew. Among them is the cocksure A.J. (Ben Affleck), who Harry thinks isn't good enough for his daughter (Liv Tyler), until the mission proves otherwise.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Green Mile
AMC.HD.us2.description: Paul Edgecomb walked the mile with a variety of cons. He had never encountered someone like John Coffey, a massive black man convicted of brutally killing a pair of young sisters. Coffey had the size and strength to kill anyone, but not the demeanor. Beyond his simple, naive nature and a deathly fear of the dark, Coffey seemed to possess a prodigious, supernatural gift. Paul began to question whether Coffey was truly guilty of murdering the two girls.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Cast Away
AMC.HD.us2.description: Obsessively punctual FedEx executive Chuck Noland (Tom Hanks) is en route to an assignment in Malaysia when his plane crashes over the Pacific Ocean during a storm. The sole survivor of the flight, Chuck washes ashore on a deserted island. When his efforts to sail away and contact help fail, Chuck learns how to survive on the island, where he remains for years, accompanied by only his handmade volleyball friend, Wilson. Will Chuck ever return to civilization and reunite with his loved ones?

AMC.HD.us2.title: Forrest Gump
AMC.HD.us2.description: Slow-witted Forrest Gump (Tom Hanks) has never thought of himself as disadvantaged, and thanks to his supportive mother (Sally Field), he leads anything but a restricted life. Whether dominating on the gridiron as a college football star, fighting in Vietnam or captaining a shrimp boat, Forrest inspires people with his childlike optimism. But one person Forrest cares about most may be the most difficult to save -- his childhood love, the sweet but troubled Jenny (Robin Wright).

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Audacity
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Best of All Possible Worlds
AMC.HD.us2.description: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able; JoAnne provides therapy with benefits; Orson lands from Baltimore; the party for Dr. Green ends in a cat burglary.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Days of Thunder
AMC.HD.us2.description: In the fast-paced world of NASCAR, a rivalry brews between rookie hotshot Cole Trickle (Tom Cruise) and veteran racer Rowdy Burns (Michael Rooker). When both of them are seriously injured in competition, the former bitter rivals become close friends. With Cole's spirits restored by a romance with neurosurgeon Dr. Claire Lewicki (Nicole Kidman), and Rowdy still sidelined by injuries, Cole decides to race Rowdy's car in the Daytona 500 against underhanded newcomer Russ Wheeler (Cary Elwes).

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Green Mile
AMC.HD.us2.description: Paul Edgecomb walked the mile with a variety of cons. AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: All Gummed Up
AMC.HD.us2.description: Pharmacist Stooges invent a youth serum.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Tombstone
AMC.HD.us2.description: Wyatt Earp and his brothers, Morgan and Virgil, have left their gunslinger ways behind them to settle down and start a business in the town of Tombstone, Ariz. While they aren't looking to find trouble, trouble soon finds them when they become targets of the ruthless Cowboy gang. Now, together with Wyatt's best friend, Doc Holliday, the brothers pick up their guns once more to restore order to a lawless land.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Days of Thunder

Whether dominating on the gridiron as a college football star, fighting in Vietnam or captaining a shrimp boat, Forrest inspires people with his childlike optimism. But one person Forrest cares about most may be the most difficult to save -- his childhood love, the sweet but troubled Jenny (Robin Wright).

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Martian
AMC.HD.us2.description: When astronauts blast off from the planet Mars, they leave behind Mark Watney, presumed dead after a fierce storm. With only a meager amount of supplies, the stranded visitor must utilize his wits and spirit to find a way to survive on the hostile planet. Meanwhile, back on Earth, members of NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home, while his crew mates hatch their own plan for a daring rescue mission.

AMC.HD.us2.title: I Am Number Four
AMC.HD.us2.description: John Smith (Alex Pettyfer) seems like an ordinary teenager, but he is an alien on the run from merciless enemies hunting him and the eight others like him. Always changing his identity and moving to different towns with his guardian, Henri (Timothy Olyphant), John has no real past and no true home. However, in the small Ohio town where he now lives, he discovers love, powerful new abilities, and a connection to others of his kind.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Twelve
AMC.HD.us2.description: After successfully robbing five casinos in one night, Danny Ocean and his crew of thieves have big problems. Despite pulling off one of the biggest heists in Las Vegas history, the members of the gang have already spent much of the money they stole. Casino owner Terry Benedict demands that Ocean return the money, plus millions more in interest. Unable to come up the cash, the crew is forced to come together to pull off another series of heists, this time in Europe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La pierna sufrida; Ni un parto más
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosaura se cambiaba el vendaje de su pierna amputada y la echaron del restaurante. Fabiola no está bien mentalmente, tiene cinco hijos de relaciones con desconocidos y su hermano quiere ligarla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de niños
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El misterio de la astrología y los secretos del amor se unen en el primer programa de citas guiado por los astros.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Si yo fuera rica
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luz se avergüenza de ser la hija de una sirvienta e inventa un montón de mentiras para que nadie lo sepa. Cuando se conoce la verdad, sus actos tienen consecuencias y todos rechazan su actitud.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Usa su embarazo para sacarme dinero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel está dispuesto a confesarle a su esposa, embarazada, que le fue infiel. No soporta el chantaje económico de Vianey, con quien también espera un bebé tras una noche de copas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tierra de nadie; Descuido fatal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Nancy y María Elena viven entre el río Bravo y el muro fronterizo, y María Elena ayuda a los indocumentados. Además, la hija de Pedro tiene trece años, y solo cuando está con él se comporta bien.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Stripper menor de edad; No a la comida chatarra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En su despedida de soltero, Félix contrató a dos strippers hermanas y una de ellas era menor de edad. Además, a David le queda poco tiempo de vida por su obesidad a causa de la comida chatarra.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me lo dice el corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Octavio no encuentra trabajo y decide irse a Estados Unidos a buscar una oportunidad, pero en lugar de ayudarlo a cruzar la frontera, lo secuestran. Amalia, su esposa, nunca pierde la esperanza de recuperarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dulces Quince
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Nancy está por celebrar sus 15 años, pero su hermano Rodolfo, mal aconsejado por Andrés, toma una decisión equivocada. Invierte el dinero que sus padres han ahorrado para la fiesta en un negocio dudoso.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Huésped de mi corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel y Sofía están muy enamorados y planean un futuro juntos. Pero su sueño se ve arruinado cuando alguien se encarga en separarlos por la envidia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No te creí
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Estela inicia una nueva relación y nunca se percata de que Humberto, su nueva pareja, acosa a su hija Mariana. A pesar de las advertencias, se niega a aceptarlo hasta que es demasiado tarde.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Renace la esperanza
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juventino es víctima de una detención arbitraria, violenta e injusta, cuando lo involucran en un delito de narcomenudeo. Jerónima, su madre, emprende un vía crucis para demostrar su inocencia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Circe mueve sus fichas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Mami Chula planea matar dos pájaros de un solo tiro. Logra que Joselito y su traidor, Augusto, vayan a buscarla y allí espera eliminarlos. Diego sufre por Isabel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La abejita contra la puerta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los esposos Beatriz y Arturo se enfrentan a difíciles preguntas para ganar un automóvil. Jesús y Josué, padre e hijo, quieren llevarse la mayor cantidad de premios posible, pero aparece Sia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sospecha de muerte
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joel, deprimido tras la pérdida de su hermana y al enterarse de su destino, decide indagar qué pasó realmente el día de su muerte, sin saber que el culpable podría ser alguien de su familia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Regrésame a mi hijo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María busca recuperar a su hijo con discapacidad, a quien dejó hace 15 años con su suegra para costear terapias. Tras la muerte de ella, su esposo le impide verlo y se presenta como víctima.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por un chamaco nos echó de la casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras superar la muerte de su esposo, Margarita echa a su hija Sayra de la casa luego de iniciar un romance con Alonso, exnovio de su nieta Alanis, a quien señala de borracha.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Twerking; Odor Dating
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Giselle conoció a Víctor y este la introdujo en el mundo de la droga y el "twerking", pero ahora él la quiere dejar. Milady tiene una condición que hace que todo su cuerpo huela a pescado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Profanación de mi madre; Mexicano engatusado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sofía ve un video de alguien orinando la tumba de su madre: el hombre es su medio hermano. César se casó con Guillermo para obtener los papeles y fue a la cita de Inmigración vestida de mujer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Soy tu madre, no tu payasa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rita acusa a Juana, su madre, de convertirse en la aliada de su nieta para obtener permisos y quitarle autoridad sobre su hija, quien rechaza la relación con Roberto, su nuevo esposo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Traición
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe disfruta de ver a Joselito y Augusto amarrados. Decide cobrarse cada una de las deudas que sus enemigos le deben. Don Mateo quiere encargarse de un nuevo negocio para tener más dinero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Herencia asesina; Musulmán virgen
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después de conocer al joven que asesinó a su hija, siente afinidad por él y quiere adoptar a su niño. Arif Khan es musulmán y Arianne lo despidió de su empresa por temor a que sea terrorista.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Niña bartender; Contacto con la muerte
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Papote tiene un bar y emplea a menores que beban cerveza sin alcohol para atraer a más clientes. Por otro lado, Andrea contrató a Yamir, una médium, quien solo la toca con intenciones sexuales.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El amor llama dos veces
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pamela, perdidamente enamorada de Dante, cae en su trampa a pesar de los consejos de su mamá. Él la abandona al saber que está embarazada y ella pierde la fe en el amor, hasta que se reencuentra con Salvador.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por un chamaco nos echó de la casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras superar la muerte de su esposo, Margarita echa a su hija Sayra de la casa luego de iniciar un romance con Alonso, exnovio de su nieta Alanis, a quien señala de borracha.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Niño abusador; La fiebre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María y Ricardo no se ponen de acuerdo en cómo educar a su hijo: ella es más recta, mientras que él es permisivo. También, Angie y Violeta corren carreras de autos y tienen diferencias.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me exhibes pero no me vendo; Ángel o demonio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lulú exige que le paguen su trabajo de publicidad en la calle, y Pedro piensa que ella es responsable del cierre del negocio. Mercy se casó a distancia, pero el esposo no llega al encuentro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Héroe anónimo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Guillermo sufre porque tiene que dejar a su esposa y pequeño hijo para ir a trabajar a Estados Unidos. Pasan cuatro años y él decide sorprender a su familia, pero las cosas ya no son iguales.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hijo de mi corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosario confirma que no puede ser madre y le oculta la verdad a su esposo porque el sueño de Gustavo es tener una familia. Ella le propone adoptar y él acepta, pero oculta sus oscuras intenciones.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cuando la fortuna te visita
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Antonio compra un boleto de lotería que resulta ganador, pero un accidente lleva a don Gabriel a quedarse con el dinero del premio para salvar la vida de su esposa. Una historia de fortuna y perdón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sin salida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Isabel, divorciada, se enamora de nuevo, pero pronto descubre que su esposo no es quién aparenta ser. Aunque su manipulación y violencia la aprisionan, un error imperdonable la obliga a actuar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un reinado de terror
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luisa y Ana, su hermana, viven con miedo por los bruscos cambios de temperamento de su padre, una de ellas está segura de que todo tiene una explicación, y no está equivocada, él pide perdón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Traición
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe disfruta de ver a Joselito y Augusto amarrados. Decide cobrarse cada una de las deudas que sus enemigos le deben. Don Mateo quiere encargarse de un nuevo negocio para tener más dinero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tentación y repercusión
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jonathan y Gerardo buscan ganar dinero en efectivo para equipar su casa con muebles nuevos, pero un celular último modelo les cambia los planes. Mientras Nelly y Nico quieren llevarse un auto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El acoso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Olinka, adolescente acosadora, debe solucionar los daños irreversibles causados por el bullying contra los más vulnerables y afrontar las consecuencias de las manipulaciones a sus amigos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Soy tu madre, no tu payasa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rita acusa a Juana, su madre, de convertirse en la aliada de su nieta para obtener permisos y quitarle autoridad sobre su hija, quien rechaza la relación con Roberto, su nuevo esposo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lo mantengo por mis hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Irma asegura que su expareja, quien se niega a trabajar desde la pandemia, la acusó de abandono, le quitó la custodia de los niños y le exige que los mantenga, aunque no permite que los vea.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La suerte es mía; Fantasía bestial
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Nadia y Camilo fueron al casino, ganaron 200 mil dólares y ahora se pelean por el dinero. Por otro lado, José se casó con Kelly por papeles, pero ella tiene un hijo que impone las reglas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mentira suicida; Deportada en barco
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hermano de Víctor se suicidó porque su novia publicó un video en el que anunció que se quitaría la vida. En otro caso, Bárbara no tiene papeles, estaba en el barco de Bilys y la deportaron.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Le puse el cuerno y se desquitó con su hija
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Erick separa a Guadalupe de la hija que tienen juntos y la deja en otra ciudad con su abuelo. Asegura que ella es una irresponsable tras descubrir su infidelidad con uno de sus amigos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La verdadera asesina
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La necesidad de Isabel por tener dinero es cada vez mayor. Busca trabajo y se ve obligada contarle a Paloma uno de sus más preciados secretos. Diego se siente engañado por sus seres queridos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Las cosas hablan por si solas; The cleaners
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariana cuida a la hija de Brenda y al cambiarla descubre que la niña tiene muchos moretones en el cuerpo. Marisol paga condenas ajenas a cambio de dinero, y así construyó un capital importante.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Casas invisibles; Huevos en guerra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Eduardo tiene una casa en su país que alquilaba a sus hermanos, pero estos la vendieron varias veces. Ulises, por su parte, tiene una cafetería que está a punto de quebrar por culpa de su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lazos de mi corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Laura y Manuel son un matrimonio feliz que vive con sus dos hijas. En medio de un momento difícil para la familia, las dos jóvenes descubren un secreto que sus padres les han ocultado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lo mantengo por mis hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Irma asegura que su expareja, quien se niega a trabajar desde la pandemia, la acusó de abandono, le quitó la custodia de los niños y le exige que los mantenga, aunque no permite que los vea.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vagina destrozada; La acosadora
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Nayma intentó robarse un dildo y, al descubrirla, el dueño de la tienda la violó con un consolador y le destrozó la vagina. Julián es modelo y Mercedes, una de sus fans, está obsesionada con él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El embrión es un remedio; Combatiendo a la tecnología
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Valeria y Javier concibieron otro hijo para que le donara la médula a su hija con leucemia. La niña falleció y ahora Valeria quiere interrumpir el embarazo. Un niño de cuatro años es adicto a la tecnología.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Barrera de rencor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La madre de Jovita le arrebató a su bebé cuando ella era apenas una adolescente. Pasaron muchos años antes de que pudiera reencontrarse con su hija Adriana, quien llena de rencor, la rechaza con dureza.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Jardín seco
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María no puede darle un hijo a su esposo Pedro y el matrimonio se termina. Ella reniega de la vida y de su fe, pero Diego aparece en su vida y la reconcilia con el amor. Ambos reciben un milagro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Que no me olvide
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La madre de Laura tiene problemas de memoria y su hija la califica de inútil. Entonces, ella se refugia en su otro hijo, Camilo. Cuando la situación se complica, descubren que se trata de un caso de Alzhéimer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vaso frágil
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esperanza crítica a su madre, quien soporta la violencia y alcoholismo de su esposo, sin imaginar la lección que recibirá al establecer su propia familia, su única opción será pedir ayuda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una probadita y ya
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La presión social, la situación económica y los problemas en el seno de su familiar empujan a Ana al mundo del alcohol y las drogas. Su fuerte adicción la lleva a convertirse en una indigente.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La necesidad de Isabel por tener dinero es cada vez mayor. Busca trabajo y se ve obligada contarle a Paloma uno de sus más preciados secretos. Diego se siente engañado por sus seres queridos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Salida rápida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Beatriz invitó a su cuñado Eder a jugar, ellos quieren vencer, pero una receta les da problemas. Los esposos Rosalía y David están listos para enfrentar el desafío y ganar un Arréglame mi casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por remordimiento; Vitiligo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rotsen perdió a su familia en un accidente de tránsito y el conductor se fugó. También, Joana padece vitiligo, una enfermedad que le causa más problemas sociales que médicos.
